description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5.1 Docker image and defines two stages: test_quality and test_badge. In the test_quality stage add an rspec job that uses a postgres:latest service, sets BUNDLER_VERSION, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_USER, and RAILS_ENV variables, runs cp config/database-ci.yml config/database.yml, apt-get update && apt-get install -y nodejs --no-install-recommends, gem install bundler:2.0.1, bundle check || bundle install, bundle exec rake db:create, bundle exec rake db:migrate, bundle exec rspec, and bundle exec rake spec:javascript, and stores the generated coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the test_badge stage add a coverage job that depends on rspec, moves the coverage/ directory to public/ with mv coverage/ public/, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact that expires in 30 days, and configure the job to run only on the master and development branches.
